eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: dama m mi, ni, di zaa nin naayi kyɛ ka n nya fa-m‑basi, ka di nyɛ la yarim wunsusigu zugu, ni Yisa Kirisita Sii la suŋŋsim zugu gba.

eng: They asked only that we would remember the poor, which was certainly something I was willing to do.
local: Ni, see ka ti teaari ba faradima maa yɛla, din nyɛ man gba ŋɔn boori n niŋi seelli la ni nimbirimoaa.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: Ii! - m mari la tama ka bu birisira, ni, n bu ya di vi seelikam zaa puuni. Ni, n nin mari dablim n‑tɔ'asi yɛligu maa paalu ni pampaŋŋɔa, hoo man daa pun tɔ'asi ka sahakam. Ka lala nin kyɛ ka Kirisita yuuri du n yɛla zugu, di yi ti nyɛ la man na bɛ ni maa zugu, bee, man ka ni la gba zugu.

eng: But when Cephas came to Antioch, I opposed him to his face, because he was wrong.
local: Amaa Siifasi ŋɔn daa ti kyɛ Antiyɔkku na, n daa galim u pam paalu ni, dama ŋɔn daa siri kur tumni seem maa daa bu tu.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Man saani, n yi ti bɛ n nyɔvuri ni, Kirisita nla: man mun yi ti kpi, anfaani n nyɛ di n‑ti ma.

eng: He had been eating with the Gentiles before certain people came from James. But when they came, he began to back out and separate himself, because he was afraid of the people who promoted circumcision.
local: Halli ŋɔn Siifasi daa la'amni n‑diri ni ti mabiseeba ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa pɔi, amaa Gyeemsi ŋɔn daa tum dɔseeba na la, ka ba daa ti paai na, di saha ka u daa zɔri la dabeem zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ban daa boori gunibu yɛla la zugu, ka daa naayi labi nyaaŋŋa n‑wɔligi u maŋŋa ka kyɛ ti mabiisi wa.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Tɔ - n yi ti kpalim m‑bɛ n duniya wa ningbina la ni, n nin toaai n‑tumni n tuma m‑paasi n‑nyari tuma maa bukyi. Ay! - n ku toaai m‑baŋŋi man nin yiisi sɔseaa.

eng: And the rest of the Jews also joined him in this hypocrisy so that even Barnabas got carried away with them in their hypocrisy.
local: Ka lala daa kyɛ ka ti mabiisi ban nyɛ Yɛhudiyadima maa m‑paasi u zugu daa la'am m‑bɛ u birikɔnsi beebu ni; halli ka Baanabasi gba daa dɔli ba birikɔnsi soori maa.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: Sɔya ayi wa n dɔya, ka di mugsi ma ka n ku toaai n‑yiisi yinni: m boori n bakki n‑kyaŋŋi nti bɛ Kirisita saani - lala n sɔa: bee, m ma'ai ni?.

eng: But when I saw that they werent acting consistently with the truth of the gospel, I said to Cephas in front of everyone, If you, though youre a Jew, live like a Gentile and not like a Jew, how can you require the Gentiles to live like Jews.
local: Man ŋɔn daa ti nya ka ba daa bu dɔli lahabasuŋŋu maa soori ni yɛlimaŋni, n daa zɛ la ba zaa tooni nti yɛli Siifasi, ni, Nyin nyɛ la Yɛhudiya nira, amaa ka i bɛ la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa beesigu, ka bu ŋmani Yɛhudiyadoowa. Ka di kyaŋŋi la wula ka i boori i mugsi ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa ka ba bɛ ni kaman Yɛhudiyadima.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Amaa di mun kpa la talasi ni n kpalim m‑bɛ kpa, ka di nyɛ la yarima suŋŋsim zugu.

eng: We are born Jews—were not Gentile sinners.
local: Tirim muna - ba dɔ'ai ti la Yɛhudiyadima, ka pa la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima, tin boonni seeba, ni, ala'akyi dima la.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: Tɔ: n siri mi halli, ni, lala n nyɛ di. Ni, ka di zugu n nin kpalim n‑na bɛ ya saani, ni ya ti kyɛnni tooni n‑nyari sufupeelim pam ya yɛdda niŋbu zugu.

eng: However, we know that a person isnt made righteous by the works of the Law but rather through the faithfulness of Jesus Christ. We ourselves believed in Christ Jesus so that we could be made righteous by the faithfulness of Christ and not by the works of the Law—because no one will be made righteous by the works of the Law.
local: Ti baŋŋiya, ni, nira m bɛ yɛlimaŋni daana Naawunni tooni la ŋɔn kur niŋi Yisa Masiiya yɛdda zugu, ka pa la fukumsi zaalikpana ŋɔn wulisi seem dɔligu zugu. Ka dizugu ti niŋi Kirisita Yisa yɛdda, ni ti leebi la yɛlimaŋni dima lala yɛdda zugu, pa zaalikpana dɔligu zugu: dama sɔsɔ ku toaai m‑bɛ yɛlimaŋni daana kasikasi, zaalikpana dɔligu zugu.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: Dama n nin laa m‑bɛ ya saani yaasa, ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka ya sufu maai zaa, ka ya tibgri Kirisita Yisa man yɛla zugu.

eng: But if it is discovered that we ourselves are sinners while we are trying to be made righteous in Christ, then is Christ a servant of sin? Absolutely not!.
local: Tɔ, ka dinŋɔna ti kpaŋŋni ti mansi ni ti yi taalli ni Naawunni saani hoo yɛlimaŋni dima, ka di nyɛ la tin la'am ni Kirisita la zugu; ka di saha ka ti nya m‑baŋŋi, ni, ti nyɛ la ala'akyi dima, kaman ban pun pa Yɛhudiyadima la ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Kala, dinŋɔ wulisiya, ni, Masiiya zɛ la ala'akyi tumpu nyaaŋŋa? Ay - soori ka ni gba!.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Yɛttɔ'a seelikam zaa yɔri, ya na kpalimma m‑bɛ beesisuŋŋu din sumsi Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu niriba la. Di yi bɛ lala, man yi kyɛ ya saani na n‑nya yan bɛ seem, bee, n na bɛ wa'aligu ka kur wumni ya damni, di zaa nyɛ la yimmu. Dama n nin baŋŋi, ni, ya la'amni m‑bari n‑zaani Sii maa nangbanyinni ni, n‑tumni lahabasuŋŋu yɛdda tuma ni nimbirimoaa.

eng: If I rebuild the very things that I tore down, I show that I myself am breaking the Law.
local: Ka n yi piili n‑yɛ m‑mɛ man daa pun tɛ zaalikpanseesi m‑basi la, dinŋɔna n wulisiri m mammaŋŋa yɛla, ni, n nyɛ la ŋɔn burigi zaaligu.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Ninvugseeba m bɛ ni m bu boori ya yɛla halli. Amaa yan di zɔri ba yɛla dabeem seelikam zaa zugu. Ba zabboobu wulisiri la ya zaa yɛla, ni, ban nin baasi yɔri, yarim mun nin nya tuliginsim, ka di yi la Naawunni saani na.

eng: I died to the Law through the Law, so that I could live for God.
local: Fukumsi zaaligudima ŋɔn bɛ ni zugu, n daa kpi n‑ti zaaligu wa yɛla; din yɛ kyɛ ka n ti bɛ ni n‑tiri Naawunni. Man pun la'am n‑kpi Kirisita Masiiya dɔpulli maa zugu.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Ya deaari la piini Kirisita yuuri zugu: di pa la yan niŋi u yɛdda seem la kɔkɔa, amaa halli yan di wahala u zugu gba n nyɛ piinisuŋŋu n‑ti ya.

eng: I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. And the life that I now live in my body, I live by faith, indeed, by the faithfulness of Gods Son, who loved me and gave himself for me.
local: Dinzugu di laa m‑pa la mani m bɛ ni, amaa di nyɛ la Kirisita m bɛ ma ni zugu. Nyɔvuriseaa ni man bɛ duniya wa ni pampaŋŋɔa, Naawunni Bii maa yɛdda zugu ka m bɛ ni, dama u wuri ma pam ka daa yiisi u nyɔvuri n‑tisi man zugu.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Ya bu nya? - yan moori seem la, di nyɛ la yan pun nya ka wumni pampaŋŋɔ, ni, man gba moori lala.

eng: I dont ignore the grace of God, because if we become righteous through the Law, then Christ died for no purpose.
local: Man mun ku sakki, ni, n za'asi Naawunni piini suma wa. Amaa di yi nyɛ la fukumsi zaaligudima zugu ka nira nin toaai n‑yi taalli puuni Naawunni saani hoo yɛlimaŋni daana, dinŋɔna Kirisita Masiiya kum maa daa ka gbinni!.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: M mabiisi, ya beebu ŋɔn bɛ ni Yisa Kirisita zugu seem n kpamsiri ya sufu, ka u wurilim n tisiri ya sufudoaa; yan mun bɛ ni ni taaba Naawunni Vuusim Kasi zugu, halli ya mari nirilim ni namboo n‑tiri taaba.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: Tɔ: ka anŋɔ zaa yi siri bɛ lala, dinŋɔna n susiri ya ni, ni, ya sakkri taaba, ka laa n‑wuri taaba, ka ya sufu la'am n‑leebi yummu, nti mari nangbanyinni ni taaba: lala nin kyɛ ka n sufu maai zaa.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Yan di kyɛ ka beem bee fugbu bɛ ya saani, amaa ya sigsima ya mansi n‑tiri taaba, ka kyɛ ka ya sɔkam gɔsiri u taraana yɛla, ni, u tibsi n‑gaari u mammaŋŋa.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Ya kyɛ ka ya sɔkam ba'a bɛ la u taraana bukyi ni, pa la u mammaŋŋa dinni.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Ya laa n‑kyɛ ka ya sufu ni teesa dɔli la ya taaba beebu Kirisita Yisa Masiiya saani. Dama ŋɔn Yisa muna#:-.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: U kur mari la Naawunni beesigu saha kam, Ka di zugu u bu yɛli, ni, u faama lala beesigu Ni u ti sa'ai ni Naawunni beebu.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: U daa sigsi u maŋŋa n‑kyɛ u toori yuubu yɛla zaa; U daa zaŋŋi u maŋŋa n‑labgi daabri, Ka laa n‑ŋmanni hoo ninsaalidima. Ka ŋɔn daa baŋŋi, ni, u ŋmanni hoo ninsaala.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: U daa sigsi u maŋŋa ka daa sakki kum - halli dɔpulli zugu kum gba.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Dinzugu Naawunni daa duusi u n‑tibgi u zaa, Ka ti u yuuri Ka ka gaari yuya zaa.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: Dinŋɔ zugu ka sɔkam zaa nin ti gbaani u tooni: Ban bɛ saazugu nin gbaani u tooni, Ban bɛ duniya wa ni gba nin ti gbaani u, Ni ban bɛ tinlɔŋŋu ni gba m‑paasi.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: Ka sɔkam zaa nin ti mooli u yuuri Ka sakki, ni, Yisa Kirisita nyɛ la ti Dugma, Ka di kyɛ ka u Ba Naawunni nya gyirima.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: M mabiisi, di veeli pam yan daa sakki n‑ti ma, man ŋɔn daa bɛ ya saani la, halli ni man laa n‑ka ya saani wa gba. Amaa ya kur kpalimma n‑kpaŋŋni ya mansi n‑tumna, ni ya ti paai ya tuliginsim zaa ni nimmoosi.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Dama Naawunni kur kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani, ka ŋɔn la'amni n‑tumna, ni ya ti sakki ŋɔn boori seem ka laa n‑nyaŋŋi n‑tum.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Tɔ; ya kpalimma n‑tumni lala ka di kyɛ ka birisigu ni nangbankpeemni ti bɛ ya saani.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: Ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka galinsi seelli ku paai ya, ka ya nin nyɛ la Naawunni bisuma m‑bɛ duniya wa dima sunsukkuni, halli ni ba zaa n nyɛ tumbeeri dima zaa yɔri. Ya nin ŋmanni hoo saŋmariwuusi ŋɔn nɛ seem la, ka ba nin nya.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: Ya nin ŋmani lala, yan zaŋŋni nyɔvuri lahabaari n‑tiri ba sahanseaa la. Ya yi niŋi lala, n sufu nin mari yaa Kirisita Dabsiri maa daari, dama din nin ti wulisi, ni, n kpaŋmaŋni ni n tuma maa zaa daa pa yɔri.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Di ŋmanni la yan maanni la sara ka man mun nyɛ ka koom ka ba kpaara - di nyɛ la: ya niŋni yɛdda n‑kyɛnni tooni, halli n kum daari ti paai na. Ni di zaa yɔri, n sufu yi maai ka n sufumaasim wa nin paai ya.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Lala yaasa, ya gba sufu nin maai ka ya sufumaasim wa nin paai ma na.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Tɔ: di yi nyɛ ti Dugma Yisa yiiko zugu, m mari tama, ni n nin tum ti mabii Timɔti ya saani na pampaŋŋɔa, ka u nin tiri ma ya lahabaya ka n nin mari sufudoaa.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Ŋɔn kɔkɔ n nyɛ ŋɔn suŋŋni ma n yɛla kam puuni, ka laa n‑nyɛ ŋɔn gɔsiri ya zugu ni nimbirimoaa.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Banla zaa ba'a bɛ la ba maŋtoori yɛla ni, pa Yisa Kirisita yɛla ni.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Amaa ŋɔn Timɔti muna, yan mi u beebu ŋɔn nyɛ seem, ni, u suŋŋni ma zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu tuma hoo biiya ŋɔn suŋŋni u ba seem la.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: Dinzugu m mari tama, ni, n tum u ya saani na: ka n nin niŋi lala man ŋɔn mi din kyɛnni seem n‑ti ma sahanseaa.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Halli ni di zaa yɔri, n niŋi Yisa yɛdda, ni, di ku yuui ka n nin kyɛ ya saani na m mammaŋŋa.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: M mabiisi, n nya ka di nyɛ la talasi ni n tum ti mabii Ɛpafrɔditusi ni u labi ya saani na. U nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn la'am ni ma n‑tumna, hoo soogyadima ayi ŋɔn yi suŋŋni taaba seem la. Ŋɔna ka ya daa tum n saani na ni u zɛ ya zaani ni n‑suŋŋni ma.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: N nin tum u lala, dama u sufu zaa bɛ la ya yɛla ni; ka din paasi lala nyɛ la: u baŋŋiya, ni, ya daa wum u alaafɛ kaalinsi lahabaari, ka di daa niŋi u sufusa'aŋŋu pam.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: U siri daa ka alaafɛa, ka di daa bu veeli gba - halli ni u ti ya n‑kpi gba. Amaa Naawunni daa zɔ u namboo, halli pa la ŋɔn kɔkɔ amaa man gba daa nya lala namboo maa. Di yi pa lala n naa n‑nya sufusa'aŋŋu m‑paasi n sufusa'aŋŋu ni.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Anŋɔ zaa zugu ka n yɛli, ni, see ka n tum u ya saani na yooma. Lala nin kyɛ ka ya nin laa n‑nya u ka ya sufu maai di zugu, ka man mun ku laa n‑nya sufusa'aŋŋu u yɛla zugu.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Dinŋɔna ya deaama u ti Dugma zugu, ka kyɛ ka ya sufu maai u zugu. Halli lala taabu niriba zaa ka ya pun deaari n‑tiri ba gyirima.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: Dama ŋɔn Ɛpafrɔditusi daa tumni n‑tiri Kirisita, halli nti pɔri kum; u daa zaŋŋi u nyɔvuri m‑pa talima, ka u daa niŋi lala ni u ti zɛ ya zaani ni n‑suŋŋni ma, sahanseaa yan daa bu nyaŋŋi n‑kyɛ n saani na la.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: Tɔ, m mabiisi, din kpalim nyɛ la: ni, ya mari sufupeelli ti Dugma zugu. M maali n‑sɔbri man pun sɔbi seem n‑ti ya, amaa lala bu tɔ n saani, ka yarima mun nin nya suŋŋsim di zugu, ka yɛttɔ'abeoo ku ti paai ya na.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Ya baŋŋma ninvugseeba ban ŋmani la baasi la, tumbeeri zaa tumniba la, ban boori ningbina ŋmaari yɛla kɔkɔa!.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Ya bu nya? Tirim ŋɔn mari seelli maa nyɛ la gunibu ni yɛlimaŋni - ni, ti mari Naawunni Sii maa suŋŋsim n‑gyeemna, ka zaŋŋi ti sufu zaa n‑tibgri Kirisita ni sufumaasim: di pa la ningbina yɛttɔ'ari, yɛdda niŋbu n nyɛ di.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: Halli man nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn nin nyaŋŋi n‑zaŋŋi yɛdda n‑niŋi ningbina yɛla maa. Sɔ zaa yi yɛnni, ni, u mari yɛdda u ningbina yɛla zugu, man gaari u.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Ii! - Izraɛli butiri nira n nyɛ ma, ka ba daa dɔli la soori n‑guni ma n dɔ'am dabsa anii daari: Bɛngyamin za'anɔri bii gba n nyɛ ma, Hibrudoowa halaali zaa, ka n daa dɔli la Farisii dima zaaligu bamsim soori la.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: Lala soori nimbirimoaa yɛla zugu muna, n daa kari Yisa nyaandɔliba n‑namsi ba; ka Yɛhudiya dima zaaligu dɔligu beesigu ziiya ka n daa bu pɔsigi seelikam.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: Anŋɔ zaa daa bɛ la n saani hoo an mari bukyi; amaa di zaa yɔri, pampaŋŋɔ m ba'a ka anŋɔ zaa ni, halli beela, Kirisita yɛla zugu.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: M‑paasi lala, m ba'a ka bunseelikam zaa ni, di yi pa la man mari bamsim seaa m‑baŋŋi n Dugma Yisa Kirisita la - lala gaari a zaa halli nti yakki. Ŋɔn Kirisita zugu ka n gɔsiri bunseelikam hoo sa'ari ni bunkyɔ'ama: m bukyi zaa nyɛ la, ni, n nin nya ŋɔn Kirisita Yisa Masiiya.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: ka n laa n‑kpalim m‑bɛ u saani. Ka di pa ni m mari m maŋtoori yɛlimaŋni din yi la n zaaligu soori dɔligu ni na; ay! - n yɛlimaŋni beebu ni kur yi la n Kirisita yɛdda niŋbu ni na. Naawunni saani yɛlimaŋni n nyɛ di, yɛdda niŋbu zugu.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: M boori m baŋŋi u kum yisigri yiiko ŋɔn bɛ seem, ka laa n‑la'am n‑diri u wahala diibu, ka naayi leebi ŋɔn dɔli u soori, halli nti kpi.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: Ka dinŋɔna, di nin kyɛ ka n paai kum yisigri zii la.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: Tɔ; ka di pa la m pun deaai a; bee, m pun paai anŋɔ zaa ni na; amaa n kpalim n‑kyɛnni tooni n‑katti a nɔba, ni n ti naayi deaai, hoo Kirisita Yisa ŋɔn pun deaai ma seem maa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: Ii, m mabiisi, m mammaŋŋa bu yɛtti, ni, m pun deaai a. N ka seela, di yi pa la: ni, n tamni la bunseelikam kan pun gaari, ka kyɛ ka ka kpalim n nyaaŋŋa, man mun ŋɔn kyɛnni la tooni ni n ti paai bunsuma maa ziiya.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: N ŋmani la hoo ninvugsɔ ŋɔn zɔri zoaa: m moori n‑kyɛnni tooni ni n ti daŋŋi m‑paai tɔriga maa na n‑deaai ŋɔn daŋŋi tooni piini maa. Ka di nyɛ la: Naawunni ŋɔn booli ma ni m paai u saani saazugu na, Kirisita Yisa zugu.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Ti zaa yi ti kyɛ biilim ni na'akyimni yɛla ka paai ninvugmaŋni ziiya, lala teesa ka ti zaa nin teesira. Ya sɔ yi bu teesiri lala, anŋɔ gba ka Naawunni nin kasigi n‑wulisi n‑ti u.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Amaa tin pun paai zaaziseaa ni, ya kyɛ ka ti bari n‑zaani bɛni.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: Ka dinŋɔna ya la'am n‑dɔli beesisuŋŋu sɔseaa man ŋɔn pun wulisi ya la, ka laa n‑gɔsiri ninvugseeba ban dɔli lala taabu soori maa.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Dama m pun yɛli ya, ni, niriba pam beebu pa lala: ka n labi n‑yɛtti ya lala yaasa, halli ni sufusa'aŋŋu gba, ni, niriba wa leebi la Kirisita dɔpulli yɛla dindaandima.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Ban gyeemni wunsɔ la nyɛ la ba bundira kɔrisi, halli ka ban boonni seelli, ni, gyirima la nyɛ la vi yɛla, dama ba teesa zaa bɛ la duniya wa buna ni: ba naari nyɛ la baasi yɔri zaa.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tirim mun nyɛ arizana timbiisi; ti guusi la ti Tuligra kyɛnni na, ka u nin yi arizana m‑paai na - ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya nla.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Ŋɔn Yisa ti Tuligra mari la yiiko din nin kyɛ ka u su bunseelikam zaa fukumsi, ka u nin zaŋŋi lala yiiko maa n‑takki ti ningbinkyɔ'ama wa n‑kyɛ ka a leebi hoo u mammantoori gyirima ningbina taabu.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Lala maa zugu, m mabiisi, n wuri ya pampam, ka n sufu bu maai man bu nyari ya la zugu. Sufumaasim ka ya tiri ma, halli nti kyɛ ka m mari la karimbaani ya zugu gba, hoo n pun di naam ya zugu. Dinzugu, m mabiisi, lala maa n sumni ni ya zɛ yummu ya beesigu puuni n‑ti ti Dugma maa.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: Tɔ; ka nyin, Yuwɔdia, ka n susiri i ni, ni nyin, Sintikyi, gba; n susiri ya ni, ni, ya mari nangbanyinni ni taaba, ti Dugma maa zugu.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Ka nyin gba, n zɔsuŋŋu, nyin ŋɔn daa bɛ n saani n‑tumni la, n susiri i gba, ni, i suŋŋi ba lala. Dama pɔ'aba ayi wa daa suŋŋi ma pam zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu tuma, ban ni Klɛmɛnsi ni n tuntuntaaba ban kpalim la m‑paasi. Naawunni siri pun sɔbi ba yuya n‑niŋi nyɔvuri gbaŋŋu la ni.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Ya kyɛ ka sufupeelli bɛ ya saani sahakam, ti Dugma zugu. Ii, m maali n‑yɛtti ya, ni, ya mari sufupeelli.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Ya kyɛ ka sɔkam baŋŋi ya nirilim ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Ti Dugma pɔri ti saani na.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Dinŋɔna yan di kyɛ ka seelli mugsi ya, amaa ya puusim Naawunni ya susigu zaa ni, ka kyɛ ka u baŋŋi yan boori seelikam zaa, ka laa m‑puusi u taari.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Naawunni siri tisiri sugru ni sufudoaa ka di gaari ti nin toaai m‑baŋŋi seem zaa. U nin kyɛ ka lala sugru ni sufudoaa guri ya sufu yɛla, ni ya sufu ni teesa zaa, yan bɛ Kirisita Yisa saani zugu.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: Di naari, m mabiisi, ya kyɛ ka ya teesa zaa paali la ni bunseesi an nyɛ bunsuma, ni an sumni pɛ'abu - di nyɛ la: bunseesi an nyɛ yɛlimaŋni, ni bunveela, ni seesi an dɔli soori, m‑paasi niriba ŋɔn wuri bunseesi n‑tibgri a, ni seesi an mari gyirima.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Ya zaŋŋma man wulisi ya seem maa n‑tumni lala, ka dɔli yan nya ka wum zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi n tuma soori la. Ka Naawunni nin bɛ ya saani, ka ŋɔn mun nyɛ ŋɔn tisiri sufumaasim maa.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Di daa niŋi ma nya'asim pam ti Dugma zugu, man ŋɔn daa nya ka ya laa n‑teaari n yɛla maa: halli ya daa pun teaai n yɛla, amaa ya daa kɔŋŋi soori.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: Di pa la n yɛtti, ni, n kɔŋŋi seela, dama n pun bamsi man nin niŋi seem n‑kyɛ ka man mari seesi la ti sakki ma.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: N na mi n‑kɔŋŋi seela, ka laa m‑mi m‑mari halli nti yakki. Ya'aseaa, bee, sahaseaa, m bamsi yɛm suŋŋa, ka n nin nyaŋŋi bundira diibu, bee, nangbantoo beebu; n nin nyaŋŋi m‑mari pam, bee, m‑mari beela; a zaa sakki ma.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Yisa Kirisita ti ma yaa, ka di kyɛ ka n nyaŋŋi yɛla zaa n beesigu puuni.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Amaa ya daa niŋi suŋŋa pam, yan daa suŋŋi ma n yɛlimugsa puuni la.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Ya mi halli, ya Filipaai dima, man ŋɔn daa daŋŋi n‑yi Masidoonya tingbaŋŋu sa m‑moonni lahabasuŋŋu yɛla maa, yan daa suŋŋi ma seem lala saha maa. Ka ya mi, ni, lala piiligu saha maa Yisa nyaandɔliba la'aŋŋu seelli daa bu suŋŋi ma zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi tisibu ni deaari yɛla, na'ala yarima kɔkɔa.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Ya laa m‑mi yaasa, ni, ya daa ti ma suŋŋsim halli man ŋɔn daa bɛ Tɛsalɔnika tiŋŋa gba, ka di daa pa la yummu.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Di pa la m boori la piini, amaa n nya ka piini tisibu paasiri ya la nyoori.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Man mun daa pun deaaya, ka di gaari zaa. N nya man boori seelikam, dama Ɛpafrɔditusi daa mari ya piini maa zaa na n‑ti ma. Ka di niŋi Naawunni nya'asim, hoo turaali nyoobu nyunya'asiri, bee, hoo ban maanni maaligu n‑ti u ka u deaai ni sufumaasim.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: M Ba Naawunni mari la buna ni arizikki zaa, ka a bɛ la Kirisita Yisa gyirima ziiya, ka u nin zaŋŋi yan boori seelikam zaa n‑ti ya.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Ŋɔn Naawunni ti Ba maa nin nya pɛ'abu, saha din ka tɔriga. Ammi .

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Ya puusima Naawunni niriba la n‑ti ma - ninvugseeba ban nyɛ Yisa Kirisita suulinsi. Ti mabiseeba ban bɛ kpa zaa puusiri ya na.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Naawunni niriba zaa puusiri ya na, halli ban bɛ NaaTitaari yiri maa ni.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya piinisuma nin bɛ ya sufu ni sahakam. Ammi .

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Man Pɔla n‑sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya Kɔloosi dima, man ni m mabii Timɔti la; n daa di la Yisa Kirisita Masiiya tuumu, Naawunni sufu yuubu zugu. Yarima mun nyɛ la Naawunni niriba ka laa n‑nyɛ yɛdda dima ni ti mabiisi, Kirisita zugu.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Tin ŋɔn susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya sahanseaa zaa, ti teaari ya yɛla ni sufumaasim m‑puusiri ŋɔn ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Ba la ya yɛla zugu.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Dama ti wum ya yɛla, ni, ya niŋi Yisa Kirisita yɛdda ka laa m‑mari wurilim n‑tiri Naawunni niriba zaa.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Ya bɛ lala ya tama zugu, dama ya siri mari tama, ni, ya guusiri ya faari diibu saha, ka di bɛ la arizana ni. Ya daa pun wum di lahabaari maa, yan daa wum yɛlimaŋni lahabasuŋŋu maa sahanseaa la.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Lahabasuŋŋu wa siri pun paai ya saani. Ka bɛ la duniya wa lugrikam zaa ni, n‑wanni ka wala ka zoaara; ka lala ka ka wanni wala yarim gba saani. Ka daa wanni la lala yan daa daŋŋi n‑wum ka yɛla - dabsiseaa yan daa ti baŋŋi Naawunni piini ŋɔn siri nyɛ seem la - halli ni zuna.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Lahabaari maa ka ya daa wum Ɛpafraasi saani; ŋɔn Ɛpafraasi nyɛ la ti mabisuŋŋu ka ti la'amni n‑tumni Naawunni tuma. Yɛdda daana n nyɛ u, ka u tumni n‑tiri Kirisita yarim zaa zugu.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: Ŋɔna n daa teaai ma yan mari wurilim Naawunni Sii Kasi puuni seem.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Lala maa zugu, tin daa wum ya yɛla maa halli ni zuna, ti bu kyɛ ti wunsusigu ya zugu. Ti susiri Naawunni, ni, u kyɛ ka ya nya yɛm ni bamsim din nyɛ Naawunni Sii maa dinni zaa, nti baŋŋi u sufuyuubu yɛla zaa gbinni.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Ni, lala nin kyɛ ka ya bɛ beesisuŋŋu din sumsi ti Dugma niriba, ka kyɛnni tooni n‑wanni wala - di nyɛ la: yan tumni tunsuma zaa ka ya Naawunni bamsim gba zoaari sahakam.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Ni, ŋɔn Naawunni nin kyɛ ka ya mari kpeeŋŋu zaa, dama u gyirima mari la yiiko, ka di zugu u nin kpamsi ya kirikiri. Ni, u kyɛ ka ya maali siri ni ya zɛ yummu bunseelikam puuni n‑di sugru, ka laa m‑mari sufupeelli.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: m‑puusiri ti Ba Naawunni taari, ŋɔn sɛ'asi ti ni ti la'am ni u niriba zaa n‑deaai ti tɔrli, neesim tiŋŋa maa ni sa.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Ii! - u siri daa pun yiisi ti zibsim yiiko ni na, ka zaŋŋi ti n‑taasi u Biwuttigu naam ni na.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Ka ŋɔn Naawunni Bii maa saani ka ti nyari tuliginsim ka deaari ti tumbeeri kyɛ-m‑pɛŋŋi.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Naawunni Bii wa muna - sɔsɔ bu nyari Naawunni, amaa u Bii wa ŋmanni u ni; ka ba daa daŋŋi n‑dɔ'ai u pɔi ka naayi naam bunseelikam zaa, ka u nyɛ la bikpeema.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Dama ŋɔn saani ka bunseelikam daa naam: aseesi an bɛ arizana ni, ni an bɛ duniya wa ni gba; aseesi an nyara, ni an bu nyari gba; naam ziziisi dima ni suulinsi dima ni zuguraandima ni yiiko dima - Naawunni Bii la zugu ka ba zaa daa naam, ni ba ti bɛ u fukumsi ni.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Ŋɔna siri daŋŋi a zaa tooni ka buna zaa tugi la taaba m‑bɛ ni u zugu.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: U bɛ la u niriba ban la'amni taaba n‑dɔli u la saani hoo zugu ŋɔn bɛ ningbiŋŋu saani seem la. Ba toondaana n nyɛ u, sɔ ŋɔn daa daŋŋi ba zaa n‑doaai kum ni; lala daa niŋi nti kyɛ ka u leebi ba toondaana bunseelikam puuni.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Di mun daa maai Naawunni sufu, ni u ti kyɛ ka u bunseelikam kpalim m‑bɛ u Bii maa ni.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Ka daa laa n‑kyɛ ka u Bii wa ti zɔ sindaani u saani, n‑tiri bunseelikam zaa, ni u ti kyɛ sɔkam taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ba - baseeba ban bɛ duniya wa ni, ni ban bɛ arizana ni gba. Ba daa zaŋŋi ŋɔn Yisa n‑kpaasi dɔpulli maa zugu ka u ziim daa yi na ka u kpi - lala ka u leebi sindaanzɔtta.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Yarim muna, sahanseaa la ya gba daa za'asi Naawunni yɛla ka yaai u, ka di daa nyɛ la ya teesibeeri ni ya tumbeeri zugu.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Amaa pampaŋŋɔ Naawunni Bii la daa zɔ ya sindaani Naawunni saani ka kyɛ ka nangbanyinni maali n‑niŋi. U daa zaŋŋi u ninsaatiri ningbiŋŋu n‑niŋi lala, dama u daa mari ka halli nti kpi. Dinŋɔ zugu ka u mari ya n‑taasi Naawunni saani ka kyɛ ka ya ku mari taaliseaa, ka ya leebi Naawunni niriba kasi, ka ka galiŋŋu u saani.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Ya siri nin kpalim m‑bɛ lala, ya yi bari n‑zaani kpeeŋŋa ya yɛdda maa ni, ka bu birisira. Ya zɛ lala, ka kur kpalim m‑mari tama. Ya teaama lahabasuŋŋu la yɛla, yan daa pun wum lahabaseaa maa - ya tama n‑siri la. Ba daa tɔ'asi lahabasuŋŋu wa yɛla n‑tisi bunvuya zaa duniya wa puuni, halli ka man, Pɔla, leebi la ŋɔn tumni lahabaari maa tuma.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Tɔ: pampaŋŋɔ m mari sufumaasim pam man namsiri ya zugu la. Ii - di nyɛ la Naawunni niriba zaa zugu ka n diri wahala n ningbina wa ni: halli Kirisita ŋɔn daa namsi ba zugu gba, man nin naai namsigu din kpalim n‑ti ba, dama Naawunni niriba taaba la'aŋŋu nyɛ la Kirisita ningbiŋŋu.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Ka man daa deaai la'aŋŋu maa tuma, dama di nyɛ la Naawunni ŋɔn ti ma tunseaa, u maŋtoori sufuyuubu zugu. Yarim zugu ka u daa ti ma, ni n ti kyɛ ka ŋɔn Naawunni yɛligu zaa paai ya na.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: U yɛligu yɛlisɔ'ara maa nla, ka a na bu yi paalu sahanseaa la, piiligu ni halli ni zuna - duniya wa bura zaa daa bu nya a. Ana ka u naayi yiisi paalu ni n‑tiri u toori niriba la.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Ban muna - ŋɔn Naawunni boori u wulisi yɛlisɔ'ara maa tibsim ni gyirima ŋɔn nyɛ seem maa n‑ti ba, ka a bɛ la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa saani gba. Ka di gbinni nyɛ la: ni, Kirisita bɛ la ya saani, ka di nyɛ la tama n‑tiri ya, ni, ya nin nya gyirima.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: Tɔ, ŋɔn Yisa Kirisita nyɛ la ti lahabaseaa tin moonni maa. Ti kpaamni sɔkam, ka zaŋŋni yɛm zaa n‑wulisiri ba, ni ti ti zaŋŋi ba zaa n‑taasi ŋɔn Kirisita saani na, ni ba ti leebi niriba ni yɛlimaŋni.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Dinŋɔ zugu ka n zaŋŋi yiikoseaa ŋɔn Yisa ŋɔn zaŋŋi n‑ti ma la n‑tumni ni nimbirimoaa zaa.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Ka dinŋɔna ya pun la'am Kirisita saani n‑yisigi: ka di yi bɛ la lala, see ka ya bɔ bunseesi an bɛ saazugu, bɛni ka ŋɔn Kirisita zi u zizii ni, Naawunni nudirigu ziiya.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Ya kyɛ ka ya teesa bɛ saazugu buna wa ni, pa duniya wa buna la ni.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Dama ya kpi ni, ka ya nyɔvuya yi la'amni Kirisita saani n‑sɔ'ai Naawunni beebu zii la ni.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Halli ya nyɔvuri n nyɛ Kirisita la, ka ŋɔn Kirisita yi ti yiisi u mammaŋŋa paalu ni, ya gba nin la'am m‑bɛ u saani n‑yi paalu na ni gyirima.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Lala zugu, see ka ya ku ya duniya wa ni kɔrisi yɛla zaa - zina nla, ni tumpoosa boobu an mari da'ari, ni kɔribeeri, ni ligri ni neema boobu, ka di ŋmani la wuna gyeeŋŋu la, dama ya boori ana n‑gaari ya Naawunni boobu: ya kyɛ ka a zaa basi yɔri.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Dama anŋɔ taabu zaa zugu n kyɛ ka Naawunni sufu yisigra.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Sahanseaa la ya daa bɛ la beesikanŋɔ taabu, ka dɔli lala sɔya la.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Amaa pampaŋŋɔ see ka ya za'asi anŋɔ dima: suuri, ni teesibeeri, ni putoo tuma, halli yan di kyɛ ka ya nɔya tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'ayɔya n‑tuuri Naawunni ni ninsaala gba.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Yan di laa m‑ma'ari ziri n‑tiri taaba: ya bu nya? - ba zaŋŋi ya beesikurigu yɛla m‑basi, ni ka tuma zaa, hoo nira ŋɔn yeaai kparibeoo m‑basi seem la;.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: ka laa n‑yɛ kparipaalli, bunveelli. Ka beesipaalli wa mari yɛmpaalli ka di yi Naawunni ŋɔn naam ka maa saani na, ka kur ŋmanni la Ŋɔna.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Beesipaalli wa puuni ka wɔligri ka ka saani zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Griikadima ni Yɛhudiyadima, bee ban guni ni ban bu guni saani: di yi ti nyɛ tinzundima ni Sitiiya tingbaŋŋu moo ni niriba, bee daaba ni ban su ba mansi yɛla - ay! Kirisita nyɛ la bunseelikam n‑tiri ba sɔkam zaa.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Naawunni siri yiisi ya, ni ya ti leebi u maŋŋa niriba; ka laa n‑wuri ya. Ka lala zugu ya nin zaŋŋi beesipaalli wa kpariveelli n‑yɛa - di nyɛ la: nambɔzoaa ni kuŋŋa, nirilim, mansigsigu, mangbaari ni sugru.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Ya sakkma n‑tisi taaba, ka ya sɔ yi ti nya u taraana taalli, see ka di daama kyɛ u taalli maa m‑pɛŋŋi u. Hoo ti Dugma ŋɔn kyɛ ya taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ya seem la, ya gba kyɛ m‑pɛŋŋi ya taaba.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Anŋɔ zaa n nyɛ bunsuma, amaa see ka ya zaŋŋi wurilim m‑paasi a zugu, ni a zaa ti tɔŋŋni taaba ka niŋi suŋŋa deede.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Ya kyɛ ka Kirisita sufudoaa su ya sufu zaa fukumsi, dama di zugu ka ba daa booli ya, ni ya ti leebi hoo ningbiŋŋu yinni. Ka laa n‑leebi seeba ban puusiri Naawunni sahakam.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: M‑paasi yaasa, ya kyɛ ka Naawunni yɛligu bɛ ya ni, ni ka bunsuma zaasa. Ya zaŋŋi bamsim zaa n‑wulisiri taaba Naawunni wurilim yɛla, ka kpamsiri taaba sufu. Ya kur yuumni Litaafi yuuma n‑wulisira, ni wungyeeŋŋu yuuma, ni Sii Kasi yuuma gba; ya yuumni ya sufu ni m‑puusiri Naawunni sahakam.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Ka ya yi ya tumni seelikam, bee, ya tɔ'asi seelikam zaa, ya kyɛ ka ya niŋni a zaa ti Dugma Yisa yuuri zugu. Ya tim ti Ba Naawunni pɛ'abu ŋɔn Yisa zugu sahakam.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Pɔ'aba, ya wumni n‑tiri ya siridima kpaaŋŋu la; dama lala yi sumsi ban bɛ ti Dugma saani maa.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Yan mun dɔppa, ya wuri ya pɔ'aba ka di yisigri ya suuri n‑niŋni ba.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Ya biisi la muna - ya wumni n‑tiri ya ba ni ya ma dima bunseelikam zaa puuni; dama lala m maari ti Dugma sufu.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Yan mun ninvugkura, yan di kyɛ ka ya biisi beebu tɔ n‑ti ba; ka di yi pa lala ya nin daam ba sufu.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Daaba, ya wumni n‑tiri ya duniya wa dugmadima, ni gyirima ni ninzoaa. Ya gyeemma ba, pa la ban yi gɔsiri ya kɔkɔa, hoo ninvugseeba ban boori ni ba nya duusigu ninsaalidima saani, amaa ya zaŋŋi ya sufu zaa n‑tumni n‑tiri ba sahakam, ka zɔri Naawunni gba.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Bunseelikam zaa yan niŋna, ya niŋma di ni ya sufu zaa n‑tiri Naawunni, pa la ninsaalidima.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Ya mi halli, ni, ya Dugma nin yiisi ya faari na n‑yɔ ya. Ya tumma ya daaba tuma la n‑tiri ya Dugma Kirisita.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Ŋɔn yi tumni tumbeeri muna, ba nin niŋi u hoo u tuma wa ŋɔn yi sumsi seem la, dama Naawunni bu gamsira.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Ya ban su daaba la muna, ya dɔli yɛlimaŋni n‑tiri ba, ni an dɔli soori. Ka mi, ni, ya gba mari ya Dugma ka u bɛ arizana ni.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: See ka ya kur pɛ'ari n‑susiri Naawunni ni nimbirimoaa; yan di gbisi ka kyɛ puusigu. Ka laa m‑puusiri Naawunni barika sahakam.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Ka ya puusigu wa ni, see ka ya susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ti gba: ni, u ti maali soori n‑ti ti ni ti ti tɔ'asi u yɛligu maa n‑tiri niriba, n‑toaai n‑kasigri u yɛlisɔ'ara an bɛ Kirisita ni maa. Di nyɛ la lala yɛligu maa zugu ka ba lɔ ma kyɔrimi ka n na kpalim m‑bɛ lala.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Ni, Naawunni nin kyɛ ka n nin yiisiri yɛlisɔ'ara wa zaa paalu, hoo din kpa la talasi seem la.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Ya mun kur mari ya mansi ka dɔli yɛm soori n‑tiri ban pa ti niriba la. Yan di kyɛ ka sahasunseaa ti gaari yɔri.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Ya mari azamsuma an nya'asa, hoo zɛseesi an mari yaarim ŋɔn nya'asa seem la: ka mi yan sɔsiri seem ni niriba, n‑labsiri suŋŋa n‑tiri sɔkam.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: Tɔ. Tikyikusi nin yɛli ya n lahabaya zaa. U nyɛ la ti mabisuŋŋu n‑suŋŋni ti, ka ti la'amni taaba n‑tumni n‑tiri ti Dugma.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Lala zugu ka n tumni u ya saani na, ni u ti yɛli ya ti lahabaya wa, ka lala ka u nin kpamsiri ya sufu.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Ka n kyɛ ka Ɔneesima gba ti dɔli u n‑kyɛ ya saani na: ŋɔn gba nyɛ la ti mabisuŋŋu, tin mun niŋi u yɛdda n‑wuri u pam gba. Halli u nyɛ la ya timbiiya, ka u nin yɛli ya ti kpa wa yɛttɔ'a zaa.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Arisitaakusi gba ka ba paasi n zugu n‑kpari sarika duu ni: ŋɔn gba puusiri ya ni. Maaki gba puusira - ŋɔn nyɛ Baanabasi tunzɔ la. Ŋɔn Maaki yɛla ka ya pun wum, ni, u yi ti paai ya saani na, see ka ya deaai u suŋŋa.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Yisa sɔ, ban boonni sɔ Gyasitisi la - ŋɔn gba puusiri ya. Ban n nyɛ Yɛhudiyadima ka ba suŋŋni ma Naawunni naam tuma maa ziiya; ba butiri sɔ zaa laa n‑ka ni m‑paasi ba zugu; ban mun kpamsiri ma ni sufudoaa.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Ya timbisɔ gba bɛ ni, Ɛpafraasi, ka ŋɔn gba puusiri ya ni. U nyɛ la Kirisita Yisa nyaandɔlisuŋŋu. U moori sahakam n‑susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya, ni, ya nin zɛ yummu Naawunni soori maa ni n‑dɔli Naawunni yuubu zaa sahakam.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: N nin toaai n‑yɛli ya u tuma pam yɛla, ni, u tumni tunkara n‑tiri yarima, ni Leoodisii dima, ni Heerapɔlisi dima gba.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Dɔ'ata Luuki gba puusira - ti wuri ŋɔna pam gba - ŋɔn ni Diimasi m puusira.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Ya puusima ti mabiisi ban bɛ Leoodisiiya la, ka yan di tam Nimfa ni ninvugseeba ban la'amni u yiri maa ni n‑gyeemna.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Ya yi karim gbaŋŋu wa n‑naai, ya kpaŋŋi ya mansi n‑kyɛ ka Leoodisii dima ti deaai n‑karim, ka yan mun deaai ba dinni n‑karim.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Ya yɛlim Akyipusi, ni, u na teesim tunseaa ban daa zaŋŋi n‑zaali u Naawunni zugu la, ni, u tumma n‑naai.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Tɔ, ya nyam sɔppu wa - man sɔbri m‑puusiri ya n toori nuu ni sɔppu: Pɔla . Ya teaama man ŋɔn lɔ la kyɔrimi seem. Naawunni piinisuma zaa bɛ ya saani.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: Dinŋɔna m boori la ya baŋŋi man kpaŋŋni m maŋŋa n‑tumni n‑tiri ya seem, yan ni Leoodisii dima, halli ni ya ninvugseeba ban na bu mi ma la zaa.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: N tumni lala ni di ti kyɛ ka ba sufu ti kpamsi, ka ba mari la nangbanyinni ni wurilim ni taaba. Lala ka ba nin ti baŋŋi Naawunni bunsuma zaa, birisigu ka ni, halli nti baŋŋi Naawunni yɛlisɔ'ara maa gbinni - din nyɛ Kirisita la.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: Dama ŋɔn Kirisita saani ka yɛm ni miilinsi zaa sɔ'ai, hoo ninsaalidima ŋɔn sɔ'ari ba arizikki seem la.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: N yɛtti ya lala, ni, sɔ di tɔ'asi yɛttɔ'anya'asa n‑yɔmsi ya, dama a siri nyɛ la yɛttɔ'ayɔya.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Ni n ziiya ŋɔn wa'a ni ya beebu zii maa zaa, n sufu ni teesa, ni n sii maa, bɛ la ya saani. N sufu maaya pam, man nya yan dɔli soori maa suŋŋa seem, ka laa m‑baŋŋi ya Kirisita yɛdda niŋbu ŋɔn zɛ yummu seem la zaa.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Yan daa sakki n‑ti Kirisita Yisa, ni, u nyɛ la ya Dugma la - dinŋɔna, ya kyɛ ka ya dɔli u soori maa.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Ya ŋmani la bumbula m‑baari nya'a u tam maa ni; bee ya ŋmani la u duu, m‑mɛ suŋŋa n‑tɔm u zugu. Dinŋɔna ya kyɛm tooni n‑kyɛ ka yɛlimaŋni ni yɛdda bɛ ya ni, hoo ban daa wulisi ya seem la; ka ya puusiri Naawunni halli nti yakki.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Yan mari ya mansi ka di kyɛ ka sɔ yɔmsi ya, ni, u yɛttɔ'a maa mari ninneesim: a zaa nyɛ la yɛm yɔri bunkyɔ'ama an dɔli la ninsaadima teesa ni ba yɛm kɔkɔa. A pa la Kirisita yɛm yɛla, amaa arizimbɛseeba ban su duniya wa yɛla maa yɛm nla.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Ŋɔn Kirisita saani ka Naawunni beebu ŋɔn nyɛ seem zaa deede kpɛ ninsaala ningbiŋŋu ni m‑bɛ ni.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: Ka yan mun nyari bunseelli kam u saani ka bu kɔŋŋi seela. Ŋɔna n su yiiko ni suulinsi zaa fukumsi.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Ŋɔn Kirisita zugu ka ba daa guni ya, pa la ninsaadima gunibu soori ni, amaa yan daa yeaai ya duniya wa ningbina yɛlibeeri m‑basi - Kirisita gunimaŋni nla.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: N tɔ'asiri Naawunni koom suubu yɛla: ban daa su ya koom la, di gbinni nyɛ la: ni, ba daa la'asi ya ŋɔn Kirisita saani n‑sɔ'ai ya gballi ni; ka dinŋɔna ya nin laa n‑la'am u saani n‑yisigi, dama ya niŋi Naawunni yiiko maa yɛdda, ni, u daa neaai u kum ni.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Yan daa na bu guni gunibu wa sahanseaa la, ka daa kpalim m‑bɛ ya yɛlibeeri ni la, lala saha ka Naawunni daa la'asi ya Kirisita saani n‑ti ya nyɔvuri. U daa kyɛ ti tumbeeri maa zaa taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ti.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Ba daa sɔbi ti taalli sama yɛla n‑dooli, ni zaaligu yɛla zaa an galimni ti: amaa ŋɔn mun daa kpiisi a zaa m‑basi. U daa zaŋŋi ti galiŋŋu gbaŋŋu wa n‑yiisi n‑kpaasi n‑tabli u dɔpulli zugu.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Dɔpulli maa zugu ka u daa nyaŋŋi: u daa gbaasi ban su fukumsi ni yiiko n‑fa ba tɔppu neema, ka daa sigsi ba n‑kyɛ ka ba dɔli u nyaaŋŋa ka sɔkam nini nya, ka u daa bɛ tooni n‑kyɛnni u nyaŋŋni gyingaari ni la.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Tɔ: dinŋɔna yan di kyɛ ka sɔ galimni ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi bundira yɛla, bee bunnyuura, bee Kyuusi gɔya ni Vuusim Dabsa yɛla.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Anŋɔ zaa daa bɛ ni, ni a ŋmansiri n‑wulisiri la din ti ya kyɛ na; amaa a gbinni yɛlimaŋni nyɛ la Kirisita mammaŋŋa.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Yan di kyɛ ka ba bugsi ya yɛla n‑yɔmsiri n‑yɛtti, ni, ya lu ni. Ba sigsiri ba mansi n‑gyeemni malaakadima; amaa di zaa yɔri, yɛlimaŋni ba dɔli la ba suntoori teesa, ka wulisiri ban nya bunseesi la yɛla yinniyinni, ka di kpeesiri ba la karimbaani.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Ba mun bu kpalim n‑tugi Kirisita, ŋɔn nyɛ ningbiŋŋu maa zaa zugu. Dama ŋɔna n tiri ningbimmunni zaa yaa, ka di dɔli la tuga ni gyiila maa zaa ka a zaa mari kpeeŋŋu n‑tumni ni taaba suŋŋa, n‑zoaari na hoo Naawunni ŋɔn boori seem.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Yarima siri daa la'am Kirisita saani n‑kpi. Ya kpiya m‑bakki ka kyɛ duniya wa yiiko dima fukumsi: ka wula zugu ka ya na boori ya dɔli la kaya ni kyisa sɔya? - hoo ban na bɛ duniya wa beebu ni maa ŋɔn dɔli seem la.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Ni, Yan di di dinŋɔa, ya din lam dinŋɔa, yan di siisi dinla!, fa!.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Ay! - kyisa wa zaa nyɛ la ninsaadima zaaligu, ni ba wulisigu zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi duniya wa yɛla: amaa yɛla wa zaa baligri ni n‑naara.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Ban tɔ'asiri mangbaari yɛla, ni mansigsigu, ni ningbina mugsigu yɛla la, di ŋmani la yɛlisuma ka ba yɛtta. Amaa anŋɔ zaa ku toaai m‑mari anfaani zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ningbina kɔribeeri goaari bee za'asigu.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Man Pɔla, ni Sailivanisi, ni Timɔti n sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya Tɛsalɔnika niriba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni Yisa, yan nyɛ ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya ŋɔn su seeba la zugu. Naawunni niŋma yɛlisuma n‑niŋi ya, ka ti ya sufudoaa.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Ti kur pɛ'ari Naawunni ya zugu, ka kur susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya zaa.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Ti Ba Naawunni tooni ka ti teaari ya yɛla sahakam, zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya yɛdda niŋbu la yɛla, ni ya wurilim tuma nimmoosi yɛla, ni yan mari tama seem n‑zɛ yummu n‑tiri ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Ti mabiisi, Naawunni n wuri ya pam. Ti mi, ni, ya nyɛ la Naawunni ŋɔn yiisi seeba n‑niŋi u mammaŋŋa niriba.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Dama lahabasuŋŋu wa'azu seaa tin daa yiisi n‑ti ya la daa pa la yɛttɔ'a kɔkɔa, amaa di daa nyɛ la yiiko ni. Naawunni Sii Kasi siri daa bɛ di ni, nti kyɛ ka ya niŋi di yɛdda zaa. Ya pun mi tin daa bɛ seem ya saani; ka laa m‑mi, ni, ya suŋŋsim zugu ka ti daa bɛ lala.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Ka ya daa kyɛ ka ya beesigu ŋmanni la hoo ti dinni - hoo ti Dugma beesigu ŋɔn bɛ seem maa. Halli ni yan daa di wahala pam maa zaa yɔri, ya daa deaai yɛligu la ni sufupeeliseaa din yiiri Vuusim Kasi saani na.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Dizugu ka ya wulisiri beesisuŋŋu ŋɔn bɛ seem n‑tiri yɛddaniŋniba zaa ban bɛ Masidoonya ni Akaaya tingbana maa ni.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Ti Dugma yɛligu ŋɔn daa yi ya saani maa, pa Masidoonya ni Akaaya kɔkɔ ka di paai: amaa ya yɛdda niŋbu yɛla pun mooli n‑gyili luginseelli kam zaa, dizugu di bu laa n‑sum ni tirima yɛli seelli m‑paasi.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Dama niriba maa zaa pun mi ka tɔ'asiri tin daa kyɛ ya saani na ka ya deaai ti suŋŋa seem, ni, yan daa ŋmaligi n‑kyaŋŋi Naawunni saani ka kyɛ buga, ni ya ti gyeem Naawummaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ Nyɔvuri Daana wa.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: Ni, ya laa n‑kpalim n‑guusiri ŋɔn Naawunni Bii la kyɛnni na, ni, u nin ti yi arizana ni sahanseaa n‑labi na. Lala Bii maa nyɛ Yisa, Naawunni ŋɔn daa neaai sɔ kum ni. U nyɛ la ŋɔn fa ti n‑yiisi Naawunni sufuyisigri kan ya n‑kyɛ na la ni m‑basi.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: Ti mabiisi, ya mammaŋŋa mi tin daa kyɛ ya saani na seem la, ni, di daa pa la din kpalim yɔri.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Ya pun mi ban daa feebi ti ka diisi ti vi Filipaai tiŋŋa seem maa pɔi, ka ti daa naayi ti kyɛ ya saani na. Halli ni ban daa namsiri ti maa zaa yɔri, Naawunni daa ti ti sufukpeemni ka ti zaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu m‑moori n‑wulisiri ya.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Tin tɔ'asiri ya yɛttɔ'aseesi maa bu yi kyiriŋŋu bee kɔribeeri bee yɔmsigu ni na;.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: amaa ti kur tɔ'asiri la Naawunni ŋɔn boori ni ti tɔ'asi seem, dama Ŋɔna n nyɛ ŋɔn zɛ ti nyaaŋŋa ka zaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu wa n‑niŋi ti nuu ni. Ti bu tumni ni ninsaalidima nini tigi ti, amaa ti boori la Naawunni nini tigi ti, dama Ŋɔna n nyɛ ŋɔn mi ti sufu ni teesa zaa.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Ya mi halli, ni, di pa la nangbammalisim yɛttɔ'a ka ti daa mari n‑kyɛ ya saani na; ti mun daa bu zaŋŋi yɛttɔ'ayɔmsa n‑tɔ'asira, ni ti ti di nyoori ya saani - Naawunni mun ya n‑wulisi lala.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Ti daa bu boori pɛ'abu ninsaalisɔ saani, di yi daa nyɛ la ya saani bee seeba saani.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: Halli ti daa mari soori ni ti toaai n‑susi bunseesi ya saani, tin nyɛ Masiiya tuumudima la zugu. Amaa ti daa nyɛ la ban bɛ baalimm ya saani, ka mari ya suŋŋa hoo pɔ'a ŋɔn dɔ'ai ŋɔn mari u bileaa seem la.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Tin boori ya yɛla pam zugu n kyɛ ka ti daa lɔ, ni, ti purigi tin mari seelli n‑ti ya. Pa Naawunni lahabasuŋŋu la kɔkɔa, amaa zaŋŋi n‑tabli ti mammaŋŋa nyɔvuya gba, ka di nyɛ la tin kur wuri ya maa zugu.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Ti mabiisi, ya teaama tin daa tumni seem la yɛla, halli ni ti yaa tɔriga, ni tin daa di wahala seem la. Ti daa kur tumni la wuntaŋŋa ni yuŋŋu, ni di kyɛ ka ti yɛla ku mugsi ya, ka ti toaai n‑yiisi lahabasuŋŋu kan yi Naawunni saani la n‑ti ya na.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Ya nyɛ la ti sɛharadima, ka Naawunni gba di ti sɛhara m‑paasi, ti beesigu ŋɔn daa bɛ seem n‑tiri ya yɛddaniŋniba wa: ni, ti daa dɔli yɛlimaŋni soori ka tumni din tuusi, ka galinsi ka ni.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Ya mi halli tin daa tumni seem n‑tiri ya maa, ni, di daa ŋmanni hoo dɔsɔ ŋɔn niŋni u mammaŋŋa bii seem la.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: Ti daa kpaam ya, ka kpamsi ya, ka zaali ya noori, ni, ya mari beesiseelli din kyɛ ka Naawunni nini tigra, dama u boonni ya ni, ni yan ni Ŋɔn ti la'am u naam puuni n‑nya u gyirima.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Dinŋɔ zugu ka ti pɛ'ari Naawunni saha kam. Tin daa zaŋŋi Naawunni yɛligu na n‑ti ya la, ya daa deaai yɛligu maa. Ya daa bu deaai ka hoo ninsaala yɛligu, amaa hoo Naawunni dinni; ka di siri nyɛ la lala, ka kur tumni ka tuma ya saani - yarima ban nyɛ yɛddaniŋniba wa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Ti mabiisi, ya daa nya wahala hoo Naawunni niriba ban bɛ Gyuudiiya tingbaŋŋu ni la ŋɔn daa nya seem la - niriba ban nyɛ Yisa Masiiya ŋɔn su seeba la. Ya daa nya wahala ya mammaŋŋa timbiisi saani, hoo ban gba ŋɔn daa nya wahala ba Izraɛli taaba saani seem la.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Ban Izraɛli dima n daa zaŋŋi ti Dugma Yisa n‑ku u, ni anabidima gba, ka daa kari ti n‑yiisi. Ba kur tumni la din kyɛ ka Naawunni nini bu tigra, ka kur ŋmeeri nangbankpeemni ninsaalidima zaa saani.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Halli ba daa kpaŋŋi ba maŋŋa ni ba ta'ai ti ka ti ku toaai m‑mooli tuliginsim lahabaari n‑ti ban pa Izraɛli dima maa. Ba pun tum tumbeeri pam, ka ba ala'akyi tuma wa paasiri tumbeeri anla zugu, ka a paari a tɔriga. Ka Naawunni sufuyisigri naayi paai ba n‑naai.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: Ti mabiisi, tin daa wɔligi ka kyɛ ya daba ayi la puuni - kulla ti ningbina taaba wɔligri ka n yɛtti wa, pa ti sufu ni teesa wɔligri. Ti sufu zaa daa bɛ la ya nyaabu ni, ni ti teesa zaa, ni ti ba'aba zaa.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Ti siri daa boori ni ti laa n‑labi ya saani na. Halli man Pɔla daa pun kpaŋŋi m maŋŋa ni n kyɛ na - ka di pa la yimmu kɔkɔa - amaa ka Sintaani kur ta'ari ti soori.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Tama bɔ ka ti ya m‑mari ti Dugma Yisa saani - pa yarima kɔkɔa? Bee, sufupeelli bɔ ka ti ya n‑nya, u lappu na daari maa ni? - pa yarima kɔkɔa? lala saha yi ti paai, bumbɔ zugu ka ti nin baŋŋi, ni, ti nyaŋŋi n‑naai? - ka laa n‑nyuuri bara di zugu. Pa yarima zugu? Ay! - seelli ka ni m‑paasi?.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Yɛlimaŋni yarima zugu ka ti siri nya ti gyirima ni ti sufupeelli.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Dinzugu tin daa nya ka ti ku toaai n‑laa n‑guusi yaasa, ti daa sakki ni ti kɔkɔ kpalim m‑bɛ Ateensi tiŋŋa.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: ka tum ti mabii Timɔti ya saani na, dama u nyɛ la Naawunni tuntumna, ka tin ni ŋɔna la'am n‑tumni Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu mooligu tuma la. Ŋɔna ka ti daa tum ya saani, ni u ti kpaam ya, ka kpamsi ya yɛdda.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: Ni, lala ti kyɛ ka sɔ ku yɔmsi ya n‑labsi ya nyaaŋŋa, wahala wa nyaabu zugu. Ya mammaŋŋa mi halli, ni, di nyɛ la Naawunni yuubu, ni, ti nya wahala wa tataabu.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Tin daa na bɛ ya saani la, ti daa pun daŋŋi n‑yɛli ya, ni, ti nin nya wahala; ka ya zaa mi, ni, lala n daa siri niŋi.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Dinzugu man daa nya ka n ku toaai n‑laa n‑guusi m‑paasi zugu ka n daa tum Timɔti ya saani na, ni di kyɛ ka n baŋŋi ya yɛdda ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Dama n kur teesiri, ni, di pa seem ka Sintaani nya sɔseaa ni u ti yɔmsi ya, ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka ti tuma la kpalim yɔri.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Timɔti mun ŋɔn daa labi na, u daa yɛli ti ya yɛdda ni ya wurilim ŋɔn nyɛ seem. U yɛli ti, ni, ya na kur teesiri ti yɛla, ka boori ni ya nya ti, hoo ti gba sufu ŋɔn boori ya nyaabu seem.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Dizugu, ti mabiisi, ti namsigu ni ti wahala diibu puuni, ti nyari kpamsigu ya zugu. Ya yɛdda niŋbu n kpamsiri ti.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: dama ya yi ti bari n‑zaani ya beebu ni, ti Dugma zugu, di nin kyɛ ka ti leebi ban vu.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Ti ya niŋi la wula m‑pɛ'ai Naawunni ya zugu hoo din sumsi ni ti pɛ'ai u seem la? Tin mari sufupeeliseaa ya zugu la - ka di nyɛ la ti Dugma Naawunni saani - lala zugu ka ti pɛ'ari u.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Wuntaŋŋa ni yuŋŋu zaa ka ti zaŋŋi ti sufu zaa n‑susiri u, ni, u kyɛ ka ti laa n‑la'am n‑nya taaba yaasa; ka ya yɛdda yi ti pɔsigi ya'aseelli, ti nin toaai n‑ti ya bunseelli din nin kpamsi ya yɛdda maa m‑paasi di.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Ti susiri Naawunni ŋɔn nya ti Ba la, ni ti Dugma Yisa, ni, u maalima soori n‑ti ti, ka ti kyɛ ya saani na.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Ti laa n‑susiri ti Dugma, ni, u kyɛ ka ya wuri taaba, halli n‑wuri niriba zaa; ka ya wurilim zoaai m‑paasiri sahakam hoo tin gba ŋɔn wuri ya seem la.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: Ka dinŋɔna u nin kpamsi ya, ka kyɛ ka ya bari n‑zaani, ni ya ti bɛ kasi ka ka taalli ti Ba Naawunni saani. Ka di nin ti nyɛ la lala, sahanseaa ti Dugma Yisa ŋɔn ti ya labi na la, ka u toori niriba zaa nin ti dɔli u na.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: Ti mabiisi, din paasi nyɛ la: ya teaama din sum ni ya bɛ seem n‑tigi Naawunni nini. Ya pun bamsi lala ti saani, halli lala ka ya daa kur niŋna; ka ti susiri ya ka kpaamni ya ti Dugma Yisa yuuri zugu, ni, ya kur niŋma lala m‑paasira.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Dama ya mi wulisigu seaa tin daa zaŋŋi n‑wulisi ya, hoo ti Dugma Yisa ŋɔn zaali ti seem la.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Naawunni yuubu ya saani nyɛ la: ya maali n‑leebi u niriba ka bɛ kasi, ka di tum zina.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Ya zaasa mi yan nin niŋi seem m‑mari ya mansi m‑bɛ kasi ka dɔli gyirima soori.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: ka di pa la ya dɔli ningbiŋŋu kɔri soori, hoo ban bu dɔli Naawunni zaaligu ŋɔn tumni seem la.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Dinŋɔ zugu, sɔ di tum u kpeaa din bu tuusi, bee, u fa u kpeaa. Ti Dugma nin ti darigi ban tumni din bu tuusi wa tuba, hoo tin daa pun kpaam ya seem la.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Naawunni daa bu booli ti, ni ti tum la ningbiŋŋu kɔri tuma; amaa u daa booli ti, ni ti dɔli kasitiri beesigu soori.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Dizugu ŋɔnkam za'asi wulisigu wa, pa ninsaala wulisigu ka u za'asi, amaa Naawunni ŋɔn ti ti u Sii Kasi la wulisigu ka u za'asi.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Di bu kpa talasi ni n‑sɔbi n‑wulisi ya yan nin wuri taaba seem, dama Naawunni pun wulisi ya yan nin wuri ya mabiisi seem, ka ya bamsi lala u saani suŋŋa.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Ka lala ka ya siri wuri ya mabiisi ban bɛ Masidoonya tingbaŋŋu zaa; amaa, ti mabiisi, ti kpaamni ya, ni, ya kur niŋma lala m‑paasira.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Ya kpaŋŋma ya maŋŋa m‑bɛ baalimm, ka kyɛ ka ya teesa bɛ ya mammaŋŋa yɛla ni, ka bɔ ya mammaŋŋa nuu tuma n‑tumna, hoo tin daa pun wulisi ya seem la.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Ya yi niŋni dinŋɔa, lala nin kyɛ ka ban bɛ kpaŋŋa nin ti ya gyirima, ka ya mun ku pɔsigi bunseelli kam.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: Ti mabiisi, ti bu boori ni ya bɛ ziilinsi ni zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ninvugseeba ban gbisiri kum ni la yɛla, ka di nin kyɛ ka ya ku fabinna ban kpi la zugu hoo ban ka tama ŋɔn niŋni seem la.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Dama ti yi niŋi yɛdda, ni, Yisa daa kpiya ka laa n‑neaai yaasa, ti laa n‑niŋi yɛdda, ni, Naawunni nin ti kyɛ ka Yisa ninvugseeba ban gbisiri kum ni la ti dɔli Yisa n‑labi na.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Ti Dugma yɛligu ŋɔn wulisi seem ka ti yɛtti ya maa: tiseeba ban ya n‑kpalim m‑mari nyɔvuri halli nti paai ti Dugma lappu na saha la muna - ti ku ti daŋŋi ban pun gbisiri kum ni la tooni.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Dama ba nin tasi pampam, ka niriba nin ti wum malaakadima zuguraana kukɔri ni Naawunni kikaa kunkuma. Di saha ka ti Dugma mammaŋŋa nin ti yi saazugu n‑sigi na; ka Kirisita Masiiya ninvugseeba ban pun kpi la nin ti daŋŋi kum ni neaari.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Ka tiseeba ban kpalim m‑mari nyɔvuri m‑bɛ duniya wa ni - tin ni ban nin ti la'am n‑kyaŋŋi nti kpɛ sangbana ni, n‑tuusi ti Dugma Yisa soori saazugu sa; lala ka ti nin ti kpalim m‑bɛ ti Dugma maa saani halli ni saha din ka tɔriga.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Dizugu ya zaŋŋma yɛttɔ'a wa m‑maari taaba sufu.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Man Pɔla, ni Sailivanisi, ni Timɔti n sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya Tɛsalɔnika niriba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni Yisa maa. Ya nyɛ ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya ŋɔn su seeba la.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Naawunni niŋma yɛlisuma n‑niŋi ya, ka ti ya sufudoaa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: Ti mabiisi, ti kur pɛ'ari Naawunni ya zugu, ka di sum ni lala, dama ya yɛdda kur zoaari m‑paasira, ka ya wurilim zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya taaba saani gba zoaari pam.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Dinzugu ti kur nyuuri la bara n‑yɛtti Naawunni niriba zaa n‑wulisiri ba yan zɛ yummu seem, ni ya yɛdda niŋbu yɛla, halli ni ya nyari namsigu ka diri wahala zaa.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Dinŋɔ n wulisi, ni, Naawunni sariya karibu tuusiya zaa, ni, ya nyɛ la ban sum ni Naawunni naam, halli ni ya diri wahala u naam la zugu.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Naawunni nin niŋi din tuusi. U nin kyɛ ka ban namsiri ya la ti nya namsigu.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: Ka yarima muna, yan ŋɔn nya namsigu la, u nin taasi yɔlisimma na nti ya, ka laa n‑zaŋŋi n‑ti tirima gba. U nin niŋi lala ti Dugma Yisa ni u malaaka yiikodaandima ŋɔn yi ti yi arizana ni na sahanseaa.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: U nin zaŋŋi bugum din dira n‑kyɛ na, ni u ti darigi ban bu mi Naawunni maa tuba, ni ban za'asi ti Dugma Yisa lahabasuŋŋu maa tuba gba.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Ba nin ti yɔ ba ba taalli samni m‑basi ba yɔri, saha kan ka naari; ka ba nin kpalim n‑zɛ wa'aligu n‑kɔŋŋi ti Dugma gyirima ni u yiiko ni beebu maa.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: Ti Dugma Yisa nin labi na di daari maa, nti nya gyirima u niriba saani, ni tibgri ban pun niŋi u yɛdda saani. Ya gba nin ti bɛ niriba wa sunsukkuni, yan daa deaai lahabaseelli tin daa tɔ'asi n‑ti ya la zugu.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Di zugu ka ti kur susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya. Ti susiri Naawunni, ni, u ti kyɛ ka ya bɛ beesisuŋŋu hoo ŋɔn booli ya ni ya bɛ seem la, ka zaŋŋi u yiiko n‑suŋŋi ya ka ya tum ya sufu yuubu tuma, ni ya yɛdda tuma, n‑naai; ka bu pɔsigi seela.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ka ti susiri Naawunni lala, ni, ti Dugma Yisa yuuri nin nya gyirima, ka ya gba nya gyirima u saani, ti Dugma Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya suŋŋsim la zugu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: N ya n‑tɔ'asi n‑ti ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya lappu na, ni tin ti ya la'am n‑tuusi u soori la. Ti susiri ya ni, ti mabiisi.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: ni, yan di kyɛ ka ya yɛm ŋmaara, bee, n‑gyigra, seeba ŋɔn yɛtti, ni, ti Dugma lappu na pun gaari la zugu, halli sɔ yi ti tɔ'asi anabitiri n‑yɛli lala, bee, sɔ yi tɔ'asi Yɛligu maa yɛttɔ'a n‑yɛli lala, bee, ba yi ti sɔbi gbaŋŋu, ni, ka yiiri la tirima saani na, n‑yɛli lala ka puuni.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
